title: TrustForge Proof Profile
description: Declarative profile describing which proof events to emit and how (TF-0005).

profile_version.description: Version of the proof-profile manifest schema itself.

trust_domain.description: Trust domain this profile applies to.

default_level.description: Default proof level when an event has none explicitly set.

emit.description: Event-emission rules, evaluated per emitted event.

EmitRule.description: Rule describing how a given event type is recorded.

event_type.description: Event type identifier this rule applies to, e.g. session.established.

level.description: Proof level at which this event must be emitted.

RedactionRule.description: Redaction applied to a field before anchoring.

field.description: JSON Pointer into the event payload.
